Finding: 15 dormant accounts with active privileges identified in Azure AD
Recommendation: Implement automated account deprovisioning after 60 days of inactivity
ManagementResponse: Automated lifecycle policy configured in Azure AD

Finding: 23% of endpoints running OS patches more than 30 days behind
Recommendation: Reduce patch deployment window to 14 days for critical and 30 days for standard
ManagementResponse: New patch management tool being deployed

Finding: Insufficient log retention — security logs retained for only 30 days
Recommendation: Extend log retention to 12 months for security events and 90 days for operational

Finding: Three internal applications transmitting data over HTTP
Recommendation: Enforce HTTPS for all internal and external application communications
ManagementResponse: SSL certificates deployed and HTTP redirects configured

Finding: No automated enforcement of data retention periods
Recommendation: Implement automated data lifecycle management aligned with retention schedule
ManagementResponse: DWx Data Lifecycle module being configured

Finding: Cookie consent banners not capturing granular preferences
Recommendation: Update consent management platform to support category-level consent
ManagementResponse: Vendor evaluation for updated CMP in progress

Finding: Two subsidiary privacy notices not updated for current year
Recommendation: Establish annual privacy notice review cycle with legal review
ManagementResponse: Notices updated and review calendar created

Finding: Manual journal entry approval process lacks segregation of duties
Recommendation: Implement dual-approval workflow in ERP for journal entries above $10K
ManagementResponse: ERP workflow enhancement scoped and approved

Finding: IT change management process missing post-implementation reviews
Recommendation: Add mandatory PIR step to change management workflow for all significant changes

Finding: 2 critical vendors without current security assessments
Recommendation: Complete security assessments for all critical and high-risk vendors
ManagementResponse: Assessment questionnaires sent to both vendors
